---
title: "Testing"
author: "smd"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

loading functions and libraries
```{r}
source("~/GitHub/csv_scd2/testing/csv_scd2-test.R")


```


initializing historic
```{r}
historic <- csv_scd2(historic_file = "", load_file = "load1.csv", key_cols = c("name"), run_date = ymd("2026/01/01"))
```
writing out historic
```{r}
write_csv(historic, "historic-test.csv")
```

```{r}
historic2 <- csv_scd2(
  historic_file = "historic-test.csv", 
  load_file = "load2.csv",
  key_cols = c("name"), run_date = ymd("2026/01/15")
  )

write_csv(historic2, "historic-test2.csv")
```

```{r}
historic3 <- csv_scd2(
  historic_file = "historic-test2.csv", 
  load_file = "load2.csv",
  key_cols = c("name"), run_date = ymd("2026/01/29")
  )

write_csv(historic3, "historic-test3.csv")
```
